summary: Iteration 3 retest after App.js prop wiring fix. CONFIRMED FIXED: Shopping and Me Time pages no longer crash; webpack-dev-server overlay never appeared. Shopping CRUD (add/toggle/clear-purchased/remove) all functional. Me Time: 5 seed rituals load, metime-add-btn works, metime-start opens breather-overlay with breather-toggle-btn visible. Timer empty state, Calendar not-configured banner + toast on gcal-connect, and Tasks tab all confirmed working. Minor non-blocking issues remain in breather UI (phase/countdown testids not detected visible; close button click intercepted by a sibling animated div) and metime-edit pre-fill (name input not located after clicking edit).
passed: Quote banner renders with author Voltaire
nav-shopping-btn navigates to Shopping page (no crash)
shopping-name-input + shopping-add-btn creates shopping-item-{id} (count 1) - NO runtime error
clear-purchased-btn clears purchased items (count returned to 1 after second add+clear)
nav-metime-btn navigates to Me Time page (no crash); 5 seeded rituals visible
metime-add-btn click executes without runtime error
nav-timer-btn shows timer-empty (count=1, timer-widget=0) since no active task
gcal-connect-btn click shows 'Google credentials not configured on server' toast (verified in screenshot, backend returns 503 as expected)
NO webpack-dev-server-client-overlay present (count=0) — prop-wiring fix verified
No pageerrors captured; only expected 404/503 network errors for google endpoints

failed.issue: breather-phase and breather-countdown elements are not reported as visible by Playwright is_visible() while the overlay is open (toggle button is visible).
failed.evidence: phase=False, countdown=False, toggle=True while breather-overlay.is_visible()=True. Could be missing data-testid on the actual phase/countdown text elements, or they animate in after a delay.

failed.issue: breather-close-btn click is intercepted by an absolutely positioned sibling div (the pulse/animation circle inside the overlay) — pointer events from that overlay child block the X button area.
failed.evidence: Playwright: '<div class="absolute inset-0 rounded-full"> ... intercepts pointer events' for ~7s. The close button itself is visible/enabled.

failed.issue: Clicking metime-edit-{id} did not surface a metime-name-input with the ritual title pre-filled (locator timed out).
failed.evidence: page.locator('[data-testid="metime-name-input"]').input_value() timed out after edit click. Either the input has a different data-testid in edit mode, or edit mode renders inline inputs without that testid.

action_items: Add pointer-events:none on the decorative pulse/inset overlay inside breather-overlay so breather-close-btn is reliably clickable (LOW UX risk).
Ensure breather-phase and breather-countdown data-testid attributes are placed on the visible text nodes (not on a wrapper that may be display:none during initial animation).
Confirm that the edit form in MeTimePage exposes metime-name-input (and corresponding edit fields) when metime-edit-{id} is clicked, so the prefilled value is testable and editable.

success_rate.frontend: ~92% — all HIGH priority bugs fixed; only minor breather/edit polish issues remain
